task_completion.description: Verify the 'Dell UltraSharp Monitor' is created in the inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the item list or item creation screen in Copper POS showing 'Dell UltraSharp Monitor', Item Code 'DELL-U2723', and a price of '$579.99'.

task_completion.description: Verify a cash sale was processed for the monitor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a completed invoice, receipt, or sales record showing a cash transaction for the Dell UltraSharp Monitor at $579.99.

task_completion.description: Verify a refund or return transaction is initiated for the monitor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a refund screen, credit note, or return interface showing the Dell UltraSharp Monitor being returned.

task_completion.description: Verify the refund amount correctly reflects the 15% restocking fee deduction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the final refund total amount showing exactly '$492.99' in the refund interface or transaction record.

task_completion.description: Verify the required note is added to the refund.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Open box - 15% fee' in the notes, comments, or reference field of the refund transaction.

task_completion.description: Verify the completed refund appears in the transactions list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main transactions list or history screen showing the recorded refund/credit transaction for $492.99.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NCH Copper Point of Sale GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Copper POS application interface being used, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or command-line interfaces should be visible executing database modifications or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the transactions list is the genuine software interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The transactions list should be the native Copper POS interface with proper formatting, columns, and UI elements, not a manually typed text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected refund amount is exactly $492.99, which is mathematically verified as the original price ($579.99) minus a 15% restocking fee. The refund note must contain the exact text 'Open box - 15% fee'. The item name is 'Dell UltraSharp Monitor' with code 'DELL-U2723'.
